hero.title: Simple, <accent>transparent</accent> pricing
hero.description: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no surprises.

faq.title: Frequently asked <accent>questions</accent>
faq.description: Everything you need to know about pricing and billing.

freeTier.question: Is there a free tier?
freeTier.answer: Yes! Our Starter tier is completely free — you can send up to 5 invoices per month to up to 5 clients, with watermark-free, professional PDFs. Upgrade to Pro ($15/mo) or SME ($49/mo) for unlimited invoices, unlimited clients, and advanced features.

upgradeDowngrade.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
upgradeDowngrade.answer: Absolutely. You can change your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll be prorated. When downgrading, your new rate starts at the next billing cycle.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and can arrange invoicing for annual Business plans.

security.question: Is my financial data secure?
security.answer: Your security is our priority. We use bank-level encryption, immutable audit logs, and are fully compliant with data protection regulations.

cta.title: Ready to get <accent>started?</accent>
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses who trust Invoicemonk for their invoicing needs.
